summary: A left persona panel frames the page, a central journey band leads the story, and a right-side insight stack converts frictions into sharp conclusions.
composition_pattern: left persona panel, center journey hero, right insight stack, lower friction layer
support_structure: left compact persona or segment panel
lower friction cards tied to journey stages
when_to_use: The source includes usable segment or persona evidence
The page should explain whose journey matters before detailing the frictions
avoid_when: The source lacks meaningful customer-type evidence
The page is purely a process or retention mechanics page
